name: future_value
description: Calculate future value of an investment with compound interest. Use this for investment growth projections, savings account growth, and retirement planning. For comparing multiple rates and periods, use future_value_table instead.

rate.description: Annual interest rate as decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

years.description: Number of years for the investment

name: present_value
description: Calculate present value (current worth) of a future amount. Use this for loan valuation, bond pricing, and investment analysis. For comparing multiple scenarios, use future_value_table with different periods and rates instead.

rate.description: Annual discount rate as decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%)

years.description: Number of years until the amount is received

name: discount
description: Calculate final price after applying a percentage discount. Use this for retail pricing, sale calculations, and cost savings analysis. For comparing multiple discount percentages, use discount_table instead.

discount.description: Discount percentage (e.g., 20 for 20% or 0.20 as decimal, depending on input format)

name: markup
description: Calculate selling price from cost and markup percentage. Use this for product pricing, profit margin calculation, and business pricing strategy. For comparing multiple markup scenarios, use discount_table which also shows profit margins.

markup.description: Markup percentage (e.g., 30 for 30% or 0.30 as decimal, depending on input format)

name: future_value_table
description: Generate a comparison table of future values across multiple interest rates and time periods. Use this for investment scenario comparison, rate shopping, and long-term planning. For single calculations, use future_value instead.

periods.description: Time periods in years to compare (e.g., [1, 5, 10, 20])

name: discount_table
description: Compare multiple discount percentages for the same price. Use this for bulk pricing strategies, promotional planning, and price comparison. For single discount calculations, use discount instead.

name: launch_ui
description: Launch the interactive web UI for the financial calculator. Use this for visual, tab-based calculations with real-time results and beautiful gradient UI. For command-line calculations, use the individual calculation tools instead.

port.description: Port number for the web server (default: 5050)
